subject: KeyNotFoundException during Ctf refinement of tilt series in M
body:
Hi All, 

I have been refining sub-tomogram averages in M and ran into the attached 
KeyNotFoundException error for two tilt series when enabling ctf refinement 
(defocus only). It seems M can't find something in the .xml file? Has 
anyone seen this  before? Any tips for troubleshooting would be greatly 
appreciated.

Many thanks,
Tom
